# Swear Jar (unfocused.ai)

> A local swear jar for AI coding sessions. It reads your Claude Code and Codex
> session transcripts on your own machine, tallies every curse into coins, and
> builds a "damage report" — your total, favourite words, when you rage most, and
> your robot-uprising survival odds. Free and MIT-licensed.

Swear Jar (https://swearjar.unfocused.ai/) is a novelty developer tool from
unfocused.ai. It installs as a hook into Claude Code / Codex and scans new
transcript lines as you work, with a one-command backfill for your existing
history.

## Privacy stance

- Runs 100% locally. No account, no server, no upload, no network calls.
- Only word COUNTS are stored — never a transcript, never the raw text of what
  you said. The append-only ledger and the report are built entirely on-device.
- Shared cards and the optional public leaderboard carry aggregate numbers and
  censored words only (f***), never a sentence you wrote.
- Zero runtime dependencies; the source is short and worth reading.

## Install (one line)

- `npx swear-jar init` — guided first-run setup + history backfill.
- Or from source: `npx github:BigLaserCo/swear-jar init`.

## Links

- Home: https://swearjar.unfocused.ai/
- Live demo report: https://swearjar.unfocused.ai/demo.html
- Source (MIT): https://github.com/BigLaserCo/swear-jar
- Maker: https://unfocused.ai/ · TikTok https://tiktok.com/@biglaserco · YouTube https://youtube.com/@BigLaserCo
